summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 new AI Trading Bot features: Enhanced AI decision-making, Advanced Trade History, and Daily P&L via Telegram. All 15 features verified working. Backend API tests: 17/17 passed. Frontend UI tests: All passed.

issues: Exit price shows raw float numbers (e.g., 171.23239564224906) - cosmetic issue as noted by main agent

critical_code_review_comments: All 15 requested features verified and working correctly
Trade History component completely rewritten - fetches data internally via /api/trades/history
Summary stats cards showing: Total Trades, Win Rate, Total P&L, Avg Win, Best Trade, Worst Trade
Filter buttons working: All/OPEN/CLOSED status, All Types/CALL/PUT type filters
Export CSV button present and functional
Advanced filters (date range, sort by) revealed when clicking Filters button
Sortable columns in trades table with visual indicators
P&L colors correct: green for profit, red for loss
API /api/trades/history returns 'summary' object with all required stats
API /api/daily-summary returns today's trading summary correctly
API /api/telegram/send-daily-summary returns proper error when not configured
News Feed shows sector badges (BANKING, AUTO, METAL etc.) when detected
Settings > Advanced > Telegram section has Bot Token input, Chat ID input, Daily P&L Summary toggle, Send Daily Summary Now button
seed_data_creation: Existing trade data: 5 closed trades with 100% win rate, P&L of +12,853
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features fully functional: (1) Enhanced AI with sector detection, trend-aware confidence, weighted keywords - visible in News Feed sector badges. (2) Advanced Trade History with filters, sorting, CSV export, summary stats - complete rewrite of TradeHistory.js. (3) Daily P&L Summary via Telegram with toggle and send button in Settings > Advanced. MOCKED: Market indices (simulated when Upstox disconnected), Demo news mode when no API keys configured.

tested_features.1_trade_history_summary_stats: PASS - Summary stats cards show: Total Trades=5, Win Rate=100%, Total P&L=+12,853, Avg Win=+2,571, Best Trade=+2,884, Worst Trade=2,079
tested_features.2_trade_history_filter_buttons: PASS - Status filters (All/OPEN/CLOSED) and Type filters (All Types/CALL/PUT) working
tested_features.3_export_csv_button: PASS - Export CSV button visible and functional
tested_features.4_trade_history_filters_button: PASS - Filters button reveals advanced filters (date range, sort by dropdown)
tested_features.5_sortable_columns: PASS - Table columns sortable: Entry, Investment, P&L, P&L% with visual indicators
tested_features.6_pnl_colors: PASS - P&L shows green for profit (+2,824, +2,884 etc.)
tested_features.7_api_trades_history_summary: PASS - /api/trades/history returns summary object with stats (total_trades, win_rate, total_pnl, avg_win, best_trade, worst_trade)
tested_features.8_api_daily_summary: PASS - /api/daily-summary returns today's summary (date, total_trades, closed_trades, win_rate, total_pnl etc.)
tested_features.9_api_telegram_send_error: PASS - /api/telegram/send-daily-summary returns 'Telegram not configured' error as expected
tested_features.10_news_feed_sector_badges: PASS - News Feed shows sector badge (BANKING/AUTO/METAL) in purple badge when detected
tested_features.11_sentiment_sector_field: PASS - Sentiment analysis returns 'sector' field (BANKING, BROAD_MARKET etc.)
tested_features.12_settings_telegram_daily_pnl: PASS - Settings > Advanced > Telegram shows 'Daily P&L Summary' toggle and 'Send Daily Summary Now' button
tested_features.13_settings_telegram_inputs: PASS - Settings > Advanced > Telegram has Bot Token and Chat ID inputs when enabled
tested_features.14_trade_analytics_works: PASS - Trade Analytics tab shows stats cards (Total Trades=5, Win Rate=100%, Total P&L=+12,853, Avg Win=+2,571) and P&L/Win-Loss charts
tested_features.15_dashboard_loads: PASS - Main dashboard loads with Portfolio Value=5,12,853, Total P&L=12,853, Active Positions=0, Win Rate=100%
